data.title: The oil price spike won't fix Russia's strained finances, an analyst says
data.description: Rising oil prices usually boost Russia's budget. But sanctions, discounts, and a strong ruble are limiting the benefit.
data.content:
Oil prices have surged after fresh conflict in the Middle East raised fears of supply disruptions through the Strait of Hormuz a move that would normally be a windfall for Russia.
But this time, it … [+2172 chars]

data.title: Trump’s new 401(k) match collides with a harsh reality: More workers are dipping into their retirement cash just to get by
data.description: A Vanguard report finds a record number of plan participants looted their savings last year, a troubling sign for the broader economy.

data.title: Joy Alukkas expects gold price to rise amid global tensions
data.description: “Over the next 2 to 3 years, without significant improvements in the US economy and global geopolitics, I don’t expect a meaningful correction, though dips may occur; the overall trend appears upward,” Chairman & MD, Joyalukkas Group
